films.title: Yi Yi
films.overview: A Taipei family faces personal and moral uncertainty as everyday events test their relationships and sense of purpose.

films.title: A Brighter Summer Day
films.overview: A boy experiences first love, friendships and injustices growing up in 1960s Taiwan.

films.title: Terrorizers
films.overview: An uncompromising look into urban life from the eyes of a voyeuristic photographer, a rebellious teenager, and a married couple teetering on the edge of adultery.

films.title: That Day, on the Beach
films.overview: Two friends who haven't seen each other for thirteen years reunite. One is a successful concert pianist just back from a European tour and the other has just started a new business.

films.title: Taipei Story
films.overview: A young woman urgently seeks to navigate the maze of contemporary Taipei and find a future. She hopes that her boyfriend Lung is the key to the future, but Lung is stuck in a past that combines baseball and traditional loyalty that leads him to squander his nest egg bailing her father out of financial trouble.
